name: RPlog_The_Capital_s_Underworld_Help_From_Abroad
title: The Capital's Underworld: Help From Abroad
summary: At an upscale hotel overlooking the Caamasi Gardens, the Nagai Direx Nitisha of MerrSonn arrives with her assistant Carnylla and two infant girls, fretting over rumors that threaten her corporation's reputation. She intercepts Senator Tokoga of Dac, who is embroiled in a scandal alleging he diverted funds and stockpiled weapons, and the two retire to her study for tea served by her protocol droid. Tokoga explains that the crime lord Bavon Nass is likely behind the smears, working through Senator Sandomere of Ord Mantell and a program director who fingered him, while his anti-racketeering legislation stalls. To protect both their names, Nitisha offers to attach discreet Corporate Sector intelligence agents to shadow Nass's suspected associates and dig up dirt on the director. Tokoga, wary of the political fallout but desperate for leads, accepts, agreeing to courier her a list of suspects, including the man who tried to firebomb him.
